CHART 108
In this chart Mercury is in his
own house Gemini with the Moon in Sun Sat.
Ven.
the 7th to him. The native will have Dt Mer.
intuitive faculties. Saturn is conjunct
Mercury. So the native will be blessed Mars
by Meenakshi and Chandra Mouli.
(Lord Shiva). He will have good edu
cation and be well behaved. Ht; will be
of a changeable nature. He will have
Moon Dh.
happiness through parents. The Sun's
conj unction with Ketu indicates father
to be employed in a religious insti-
tution or one dealing with oils or a trading concern.
He will. have both a sister and a brother elder to him. The native
may be married in between his 18th and 23-24th year. He will shine
well in a Government job. He will be employed in a chemical industry
and rise to a high position. His 25th, 26th and 31st years indicate rise
in status and income. He will have two children who will be fortunate.
